question_text: On Earth, the gravitational field strength is 10 N/kg. What does this value tell us?
correct_answer: It means that every 1 kg of mass experiences a gravitational force of 10 N on Earth.
explanation: The gravitational field strength (g) tells us how much gravitational force acts on each kilogram of mass. A value of 10 N/kg means that 1 kg experiences a pull of 10 N towards Earth's centre.
